title: Hoppers from Barrels
description: Adds a recipe for crafting hoppers from barrels.
body:
# Hoppers from Barrels
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](datapack/hoppers-from-barrels)

This Datapack adds an alternative recipe for hoppers that uses barrels instead of chests.

![The hopper crafting recipie with an barrel instead of a  chest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ExK1m0BA/images/f4b653b60b18ea142b5d3872977077218d70289b.png)
